# Model Portfolio

> Template portfolios with target weights per asset class, drift calculation, tolerance bands, and rebalance trigger configuration

**Category:** Data · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** model-portfolio · target-weights · drift · rebalance · asset-allocation

## What this does

Template portfolios with target weights per asset class, drift calculation, tolerance bands, and rebalance trigger configuration

Specifies 6 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **model_id** *(text, required)* — Model Portfolio ID
- **name** *(text, required)* — Model Name
- **risk_level** *(select, required)* — Risk Level
- **target_weights** *(json, required)* — Target Weights by Asset Class
- **tolerance_bands** *(json, required)* — Tolerance Bands (percent drift)
- **rebalance_trigger** *(select, required)* — Rebalance Trigger
- **benchmark** *(text, optional)* — Reference Benchmark
- **published** *(boolean, optional)* — Published

## What must be true

- **weights_sum:** MUST: Target weights must sum to exactly 100% (allow floating-point tolerance of 0.0001)
- **weights_sum → sum_target:** 100
- **weights_sum → tolerance:** 0.0001
- **asset_class_limits:** MUST: Respect Regulation 28 single-class caps (equity 75, foreign 45, property 25, PE 15, hedge 10, single issuer 5-25)
- **asset_class_limits → equity_max:** 75
- **asset_class_limits → foreign_max:** 45
- **asset_class_limits → property_max:** 25
- **asset_class_limits → private_equity_max:** 15
- **asset_class_limits → hedge_max:** 10
- **asset_class_limits → single_issuer_max:** 25
- **drift_calculation:** MUST: Compute drift daily as (actual_weight - target_weight) per asset class
- **drift_calculation → cadence:** daily
- **tolerance_bands:** MUST: Every asset class has an absolute tolerance band; breach triggers rebalance evaluation
- **tolerance_bands → default_band_percent:** 5
- **versioning:** MUST: Every change to a published model creates a new version; prior version remains immutable
- **versioning → immutable_after_publish:** true
- **approval:** MUST: Publishing a model requires sign-off from investment committee
- **approval → approver_role:** investment_committee

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Weights Validated** — when sum of target_weights equals 100 within tolerance; no asset class exceeds Regulation 28 cap, then Weights accepted. _Why: Target weights sum to 100% and respect asset-class caps._
- **Model Created Successfully** — when name exists; risk_level exists, then Model saved in draft. _Why: A new model portfolio was created in draft state._
- **Drift Calculated** — when end-of-day holdings snapshot is available, then Drift report stored. _Why: Daily drift between actual and target weights computed._
- **Model Published** — when weights_valid is true; investment committee approval recorded, then Model available to advisors. _Why: Model is approved by investment committee and published for use._

**❌ Failure paths**

- **Weights Sum Invalid** — when sum of target_weights differs from 100 by more than tolerance, then Validation failure surfaced to user. _Why: Target weights do not sum to 100%._ *(error: `MODEL_WEIGHTS_SUM_INVALID`)*
- **Asset Class Limit Breached** — when any asset class weight exceeds its Regulation 28 cap, then Validation failure surfaced to user. _Why: One or more asset classes exceed Regulation 28 caps._ *(error: `MODEL_ASSET_CLASS_LIMIT_BREACHED`)*

## Errors it can return

- `MODEL_WEIGHTS_SUM_INVALID` — Target weights must sum to 100 percent.
- `MODEL_ASSET_CLASS_LIMIT_BREACHED` — One or more asset classes exceed Regulation 28 limits.
- `MODEL_NOT_FOUND` — Model portfolio not found.

## Events

**`model.created`** — Model portfolio created in draft
  Payload: `model_id`, `name`, `risk_level`

**`model.drift_calculated`** — Daily drift computed
  Payload: `model_id`, `max_drift_pct`, `breach_count`

**`model.published`** — Model approved and published
  Payload: `model_id`, `name`, `risk_level`

## Connects to

- **regulation-28-compliance** *(required)* — Models for SA retirement mandates must satisfy Regulation 28
- **portfolio-rebalancing-engine** *(recommended)* — Rebalancing engine consumes models to propose trades
- **strategic-asset-allocation** *(recommended)* — SAA work feeds target weights
